purpose: To build a functional web platform enabling customers to browse products, manage shopping carts, complete secure checkouts, and view their order history, while providing administrative tools for product management.
scope_in: Shopping cart management (add, remove, update quantity)
roles: End-user who browses, selects, and purchases products.
Internal user responsible for managing products, inventory, and viewing orders.
workflows: {"workflow_name": "Customer Purchase Flow", "steps": ["Browse Catalog -> View Product Details -> Add to Cart -> Review Cart -> Checkout -> Place Order -> Receive Confirmation"]}
{"workflow_name": "Admin Product Update Flow", "steps": ["Login -> Navigate to Product Management -> Select Product -> Update Details/Inventory -> Save"]}
business_rules: {"rule_id": "BR-001", "rule": "Product availability must be checked against current inventory levels before checkout."}
{"rule_id": "BR-002", "rule": "A customer must be logged in or provide shipping details to complete the checkout process."}
{"rule_id": "BR-003", "rule": "Order total must equal (Sum of (Product Price * Quantity)) + Shipping Cost."}
assumptions: Inventory data can be sample data
Admin authentication can be basic for MVP

functional_requirements.title: Product Catalog Browsing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow customers to browse products by category and search using keywords.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must display a list of products with name, price, and image thumbnail on the catalog page.
The system must filter products based on selected categories.

functional_requirements.title: Product Detail Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must display comprehensive information for a single product.

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page must display the full description, price, available stock, and images.
The user must be able to select a quantity and add the item to the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Shopping Cart Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow users to add, view, modify, and remove items from a persistent shopping cart.

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart must display the subtotal, tax, and estimated shipping cost.
Users must be able to update the quantity of any item in the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Checkout Process
functional_requirements.description: The system must guide the user through a multi-step checkout process (Shipping -> Billing -> Payment).

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must validate required fields for shipping and billing addresses.
The system must calculate the final total including all applicable taxes and shipping fees.

functional_requirements.title: Order Placement
functional_requirements.description: The system must process the order, validate inventory, and generate a confirmation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Upon successful submission, the system must generate a unique order ID and confirm the order status as 'Processing'.
The system must decrement the inventory count for all purchased items.

functional_requirements.title: Order History Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow logged-in customers to view a list of their past orders and their details.

acceptance_criteria.description: The order history page must display the order date, total amount, and current status for all past orders.
The user must be able to view the detailed items and shipping information for a specific past order.

functional_requirements.title: Admin Product Management
functional_requirements.description: The Admin user must be able to create, read, update, and delete product listings and manage inventory.

acceptance_criteria.description: Admin must be able to update the price and description of an existing product.
Admin must be able to adjust the stock quantity for any product.

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must load key pages (Catalog, Product Detail) within 3 seconds under normal load.

acceptance_criteria.description: Page load time for the main catalog page must be less than 3 seconds when tested with 100 concurrent users.

non_functional_requirements.description: All user authentication and payment data handling must be secured using industry best practices (e.g., HTTPS, hashing).

acceptance_criteria.description: User passwords must be stored using a strong hashing algorithm (e.g., bcrypt).
The checkout process must simulate secure data transmission, even if the payment gateway is mocked.

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must be fully responsive and usable across major devices (desktop, tablet, mobile).

acceptance_criteria.description: The layout must adapt correctly and remain functional when viewed on a standard mobile viewport (e.g., 375px width).

use_cases.title: Customer Purchases Product
main_flow: Customer views product details and adds item to cart.
Customer confirms order and submits payment details.
alternative_flows: If inventory is low, the system displays a warning and allows partial purchase.
If payment fails, the system displays an error and allows retry.

use_cases.title: Admin Manages Product Inventory
main_flow: Admin navigates to the Product Management section.
Admin selects a product and updates its stock quantity or price.
alternative_flows: If the product ID is invalid, the system displays an error message.

use_cases.title: Customer Views Order History
main_flow: System retrieves and displays a list of all past orders.
Customer clicks on a specific order to view details.
